response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required C++ core — though his low-latency DLang work and open-source GIS projects show relevant aptitude.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage by NGOs
Proven experience with low-latency systems using DLang and asynchronous I/O
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ focus
Limited evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or map tile optimization work
